reviews.comment:
Excelente!! Muchos cuidados con esto del covid, usan guantes, a cada tarjeta que entregas para abonar le tiran alcohol cuando te la devuelven, muy amables en la atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent!! They take great care with COVID, they wear gloves, they disinfect each card you hand over for payment when they return it, and they are very friendly and helpful.

reviews.comment:
Atención muy buena.
Las areas son muy pequeñas para la demanda, se quedo muy corto para esta época. Refiero a delegación de ACA Barracas

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. However, the areas are too small for the demand; it falls far short for this time of year. I'm referring to the ACA Barracas branch.
